title: leocus africanus
intro: Leocus africanus, also known as African Leocus or Leopard's Bane, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infection. The health benefits of Leocus africanus include its ability to reduce fever and relieve digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Leocus africanus is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it can also be dried and used in herbal capsules or supplements.
